title: Microsoft Patches Critical ASP.NET Core CVE-2026-40372 Privilege Escalation Bug
summary: Microsoft has released out-of-band updates to address a security vulnerability in ASP.NET Core that could allow an attacker to escalate privileges.
card_summary: Microsoft has released out-of-band updates to address a security vulnerability in ASP.NET Core that could allow an attacker to escalate privileges.
email_summary: Microsoft has released out-of-band updates to address a security vulnerability in ASP.NET Core that could allow an attacker to escalate privileges. Tracked as CVE-2026-40372. Severity is rated high.

title: Mustang Panda’s New LOTUSLITE Variant Targets India Banks, South Korea Policy Circles
summary: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a new variant of a known malware called LOTUSLITE that's distributed via a theme related to India's banking sector.
card_summary: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a new variant of a known malware called LOTUSLITE that's distributed via a theme related to India's banking sector.

sections.technical:

title: Cohere AI Terrarium Sandbox Flaw Enables Root Code Execution, Container Escape
summary: A critical security vulnerability has been disclosed in a Python-based sandbox called Terrarium that could result in arbitrary code execution.
card_summary: A critical security vulnerability has been disclosed in a Python-based sandbox called Terrarium that could result in arbitrary code execution.

sections.technical:
The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-5752, is rated 9.3 on the CVSS scoring system.
"Sandbox escape vulnerability in Terrarium allows arbitrary code execution with root privileges on a host process via JavaScript prototype chain traversal," according to A critical security vulnerability has been disclosed in a Python-based sandbox called Terrarium that could result in arbitrary code execution.

Referenced vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-5752.

email_summary: A critical security vulnerability has been disclosed in a Python-based sandbox called Terrarium that could result in arbitrary code execution. Tracked as CVE-2026-5752. Severity is rated critical.

title: Microsoft traces Universal Print issues to Graph API code change
summary: Microsoft says that an ongoing Universal Print sharing issue that prevents users from creating some printer shares is due to a Microsoft Graph API code change. [...]

title: Over 1,300 Microsoft SharePoint servers vulnerable to spoofing attacks
summary: Over 1,300 Microsoft SharePoint servers exposed online remain unpatched against a spoofing vulnerability that was exploited as a zero-day and is still being abused in ongoing attacks. [...]
card_summary: Over 1,300 Microsoft SharePoint servers exposed online remain unpatched against a spoofing vulnerability that was exploited as a zero-day and is still being abused in ongoing attacks. [...]

sections.impact:
Over 1,300 Microsoft SharePoint servers exposed online remain unpatched against a spoofing vulnerability that was exploited as a zero-day and is still being abused in ongoing attacks. [...]

Assessed severity: CRITICAL.
sections.context: This story is part of the recurring zero-day pattern where exploitation pressure is highest before broad patch adoption.

email_summary: Over 1,300 Microsoft SharePoint servers exposed online remain unpatched against a spoofing vulnerability that was exploited as a zero-day and is still being abused in ongoing attacks. [...]. Severity is rated critical.
